Rating each unit of a multi-family dwelling will cost 25% to 50% less.</td></tr><tr><td colspan=\"6\">Existing home HERS rating, repeated tests are the same price</td></tr><tr><td>Duct pressure test, per system</td><td>—</td><td>Ea</td><td>—</td><td>—</td><td>228.00</td></tr><tr><td>Refrigerant charge verification</td><td>—</td><td>Ea</td><td>—</td><td>—</td><td>102.00</td></tr><tr><td>Maximum fan watt draw verification</td><td>—</td><td>Ea</td><td>—</td><td>—</td><td>51.00</td></tr><tr><td>Minimum airflow test, 3,500 CFM per ton</td><td>—</td><td>Ea</td><td>—</td><td>—</td><td>51.00</td></tr><tr><td>Add for data entry to calculate the HERS index</td><td>—</td><td>Ea</td><td>—</td><td>—</td><td>76.00</td></tr></tbody></table>"
